title: Becoming a Word Detective: Understanding Prefixes

questions.question: What does "prefix" mean?
options: a serious, official way of writing or speaking.
the basic part of a word to which prefixes or suffixes are added.
a group of letters added to the beginning of a word to change its meaning.
a relaxed, friendly way of writing or speaking.
questions.correct_answer: a group of letters added to the beginning of a word to change its meaning.
questions.explanation: "prefix" means: a group of letters added to the beginning of a word to change its meaning.

questions.question: What does "root word" mean?
options: a relaxed, friendly way of writing or speaking.
a serious, official way of writing or speaking.
a group of letters added to the beginning of a word to change its meaning.
the basic part of a word to which prefixes or suffixes are added.
questions.correct_answer: the basic part of a word to which prefixes or suffixes are added.
questions.explanation: "root word" means: the basic part of a word to which prefixes or suffixes are added.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Different types of writing (timelines, biographies, ______ have specific features like facts, opinions, and tone.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Different types of writing (timelines, biographies, autobiographies) have specific features like facts, opinions, and tone."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Creating a personal timeline helps you practice organizing events in chronological order.
Different types of writing (timelines, biographies, autobiographies) have specific features like facts, opinions, and tone.
A prefix is a group of letters added to the start of a word to change its meaning.
Learning common prefixes helps you understand new words and expand your vocabulary.
questions.correct_answer: A prefix is a group of letters added to the start of a word to change its meaning.
questions.explanation: Correct! "A prefix is a group of letters added to the start of a word to change its meaning." is one of the key things to remember.

options: the basic part of a word to which prefixes or suffixes are added.
a group of letters added to the beginning of a word to change its meaning.
a relaxed, friendly way of writing or speaking.
a serious, official way of writing or speaking.

questions.explanation: "formal tone" means: a serious, official way of writing or speaking.
